headline: Route-C profile-probe APF2 vs free (w0, wa) 4-of-4 ACCEPT at 95% across cross-SN grid (native / PantheonPlus / Union3 / DESY5).
test_type: Profile-probe via 3x3 grid of (w0, wa) offsets per dataset; chi^2 minimum across the 9-point grid is the profile-best comparator. Harder than LATEST-80's V4 systematic-perturbation grid; closer to a profile likelihood (still discrete grid, not full MCMC).

profile_probe_grid_rule.center: LATEST-75 hardened free w0wa best per dataset

desi_cmb_native.notes: APF2 slightly better than discrete-grid profile-best by 0.07 chi^2 units

desi_cmb_pantheonplus.notes: APF2 within 1 chi^2 unit of profile-best

desi_cmb_union3.notes: Widest profile gap in the grid; still inside 95%

desi_cmb_desy5.notes: DESY5 source bank not in v5 evidence-only zip; LATEST-62 free-fit comparator preserved (Route-C DESY5 full bank)

named_blockers_for_robust_P: Gate 3: DESI full-shape exact runtime (environmentally blocked at LATEST-74)
Gate 4: Full-growth likelihood / covariance / fiducial / AP rescaling (partial at LATEST-68)
MCMC posterior on (w0, wa, nuisance) marginalized over full Planck likelihood

upstream_evidence_provenance.result_pack: Pack 3 (22:06 UTC) — both native and PantheonPlus 9/9 grid runs complete

upstream_pack_chain: LATEST-62 (2026-05-12): APF2 first-order DESY5 ACCEPT at 95% (free CPL profile, delta = +4.335)
LATEST-74 (2026-05-12): APF2 cross-SN audit 4-of-4 ACCEPT at 95% (polish-bestfit)
LATEST-75 (2026-05-12): APF2 hardened polish 3-of-3 ACCEPT at 95% on cross-SN
LATEST-80 (2026-05-14): APF2 V4 systematic-perturbation grid 30/30 ACCEPT at 95% AND 68%
LATEST-81 (this pack): APF2 profile-probe 4-of-4 ACCEPT at 95% via 3x3 grid per dataset
